debug_info.goal:
a b : Rat
hb : 0 ≤ b
⊢ a.abs = b ↔ a = b ∨ a = -b

proof:
unfold Rat.abs; split <;> rename_i h
  · constructor
    · intro h1; right; rw [← h1, neg_neg]
    · rintro (rfl | h_ab)
      · exact (not_lt.mpr hb h).elim
      · rw [h_ab, neg_neg]
  · constructor
    · intro h1; left; exact h1
    · rintro (rfl | h_ab)
      · rfl
      · have za : a = 0 := nonneg_antisymm (not_lt.mp h) (by rwa [← neg_neg b, ← h_ab] at hb)
        have zb : b = 0 := by rw [← neg_neg b, ← h_ab, za, neg_zero]
        rw [za, zb]
